text:
G0110C2_WLK_ROOM_SPRT_CD G0110C2_WLK_ROOM_SPRT_CD G0110C2 ADL Assistance: Walk In Room Support Provided Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the amount of support that the resident requires for walking in their room. -=Not assessed/no information
 0=No setup or physical help from staff
 1=Setup help only
 2=One person physical assist
 3=Two+ persons physical assist
 8=ADL activity itself did not occur or family and/or facility staff provided care 100% of the time for that
